scripts.start:server: npm --prefix server run build && node --env-file=server/.env.dev server/dist/server.js
scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix shared run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix client run lint:fix && npm --prefix server run lint:fix && npm --prefix shared run lint:fix
scripts.lint:config:fix: npm --prefix client run lint:config:fix && npm --prefix server run lint:config:fix && npm --prefix shared run lint:config:fix
